mapper.select: SELECT id, metric_code, dimension_code, relation_type, description, is_required, is_deleted, creator, created_dt, last_editor, last_edited_dt FROM agent.dsl_metric_dimension WHERE metric_code = #{metricCode} AND dimension_code = #{dimensionCode} AND is_deleted = false

SELECT id, metric_code, dimension_code, relation_type, description, is_required, is_deleted, creator, created_dt, last_editor, last_edited_dt FROM agent.dsl_metric_dimension WHERE metric_code = #{metricCode} AND is_deleted = false
